_README: Per-target motif specs for the RFD2 motif compiler. Each entry is the STRUCTURED result of the curated, reconciled trajectory in audit/subQB_curation/extractions/<id>/ (GPT-5.5 + independent Claude, reconciled, then deterministically CSD-verified). The nuanced reading was done by the extraction agents; here we record only the resulting structured facts. motif_compiler.py consumes this + the real PDB geometry; all atom selection is by deterministic distance, never by parsing prose. Cofactor representation strategy = 'reactive_core_cp_body' (user-chosen): fix metal + retained chelate donors + active-species hydride + Cp* ring as a rigid steric body; do not encode eta5 pi-bonding; substrate/TS placement is a separate, flagged step.

catalytic_metal.occupancy_note: Ir modeled at ~0.30 occupancy in the crystal

cp_star.role: eta5 cap; kept as rigid steric body

first_sphere.labile_leg_fate: lost in active species; replaced by hydride (formate-assisted beta-H elimination)

anchor.description: cofactor primary aryl-sulfonamide N2 binds native CA-II catalytic Zn (held by His94/His96/His119)
anchor.rationale: de novo scaffold need not reuse CA-II's Zn; H_anchor preserved as evaluation diagnostic, not a fixed motif element (revisions doc R1/R2)

substrate.name: 1-methyl-6,7-dimethoxy-3,4-dihydroisoquinoline (salsolidine precursor)
substrate.pose_source: transferred g-double-dagger (LOW confidence: GPT-5.5 iridicycle Chen/Xiao 2015 vs Claude Noyori-Ikariya Handgraaf/Meijer 2007); placement deferred to a flagged docking step

3ZP9.verification: audit/subQB_curation/extractions/3ZP9/deterministic_checks.json -> STRUCTURALLY VALIDATED (18e, CN, CSD bond distributions, motif existence, consistency)
3ZP9.provenance: Monnard/Ward Chem. Sci. 2013 4 3269 (DOI 10.1039/c3sc51065d); reconciled GPT-5.5 + Claude
